channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I know it’s winter, but these all-time low Ninja Creami and Slushi Prime Day deals have me tempted
item.description: The Ninja Creami Deluxe and Ninja Slushi have both hit all-time low prices for Prime Day, with big savings on an ice cream maker and slushie machine.
